channel.title: GitHub Discovery
channel.description: Discover trending GitHub repos before they go viral

item.title: 🔥 huytranvan2010/AI-auto-generate-video — 35⭐ (35.0/day)
item.description:
Auto generate AI video with hyperframes
Score: 95/100 | Language: HTML

item.title: 🔥 lxcshine/nexusbox — 57⭐ (11.4/day)
item.description:
Secure sandbox for AI Agents — execute shell, file, code, and browser commands in isolation via MCP.
Score: 92/100 | Language: Go

item.title: 🔥 kamaludu/bash4llm — 34⭐ (0.2/day)
item.description:
Bash-first wrapper for Groq’s OpenAI-compatible API. Secure, portable, Termux-friendly.
Score: 79/100 | Language: Shell

item.title: 🔥 perglervitek/Pet-Simulator-99-Auto-Farm-Trainer-2026-X — 208⭐ (208.0/day)
item.description:
X edition of the most advanced Pet Simulator 99 automation tool. Farm coins, hatch eggs, complete Backrooms League tasks automatically. Fully undetected and user-friendly.
Score: 75/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 perglervitek/Pet-Simulator-99-Auto-Farm-Trainer-2026-Premium — 206⭐ (206.0/day)
item.description:
Premium edition of the most advanced Pet Simulator 99 automation tool. Farm coins, hatch eggs, complete Backrooms League tasks automatically. Fully undetected and user-friendly.
Score: 75/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 xbtlin/ai-berkshire — 4911⭐ (59.9/day)
item.description:
AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 Robbyant/lingbot-map — 7964⭐ (109.1/day)
item.description:
A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 DeusData/codebase-memory-mcp — 18528⭐ (150.6/day)
item.description:
High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
Score: 100/100 | Language: C

item.description:

item.title: 🔥 hugohe3/ppt-master — 32616⭐ (163.9/day)
item.description:
AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images · by Hugo He
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 topoteretes/cognee — 23535⭐ (22.5/day)
item.description:
Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 luongnv89/claude-howto — 38420⭐ (166.3/day)
item.description:

item.title: 🔥 nova452/ComfyUI-Conditioning-Rebalance — 274⭐ (91.3/day)
item.description:
Conditioning optimizer nodes offering IP-Adapter-like features for Krea 2 image reference editing along with bypassing the built in quality diluation from the trained safety filter and also works as a means to unfilter the model.
Score: 100/100 | Language: Python

item.title: 🔥 ZhuLinsen/daily_stock_analysis — 48782⭐ (295.6/day)
item.description:

Score: 96/100 | Language: Python
